title: allionia nyctaginea var. ovata
intro: Allionia nyctaginea var. ovata, commonly known as Allionia, is a type of flowering plant in the Four O'Clock family (Nyctaginaceae). It is a perennial or annual herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Allionia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
